issues.title: canonical circuit breaker remains the only current-live deployment blocker
issues.next_action: Keep breaker-first truth on /, /execution, /execution/status, /lab, hb_predict_probe.py, live_decision_quality_drilldown.py, and current-state docs until release math actually improves.
issues.action: 先把 current-live blocker 語義切回 circuit breaker release math；在 breaker 未解除前，不要把 q15/q35 support 或 floor-gap 當成本輪主 blocker。 recent 50 需至少 15 勝，當前 0 勝，還差 15 勝；同時 streak 必須 < 50。

issues.title: recent canonical 250 rows remains a distribution pathology
issues.next_action: Keep drilling the pathological slice itself instead of diluting the root cause into generic leaderboard or venue discussions.

issues.title: leaderboard comparable rows are back; keep the recent-window contract stable and cron-safe
issues.next_action: Keep /api/models/leaderboard and Strategy Lab aligned on latest bounded walk-forward plus the recent-two-year backtest policy; do not regress to placeholder-only or ambiguous backtest windows.
issues.action: Keep /api/models/leaderboard and Strategy Lab aligned on latest bounded walk-forward plus the recent-two-year backtest policy; do not regress to placeholder-only or ambiguous backtest windows.

issues.title: venue readiness is still unverified
issues.next_action: Keep per-venue blockers explicitly visible on Dashboard, /lab, and /execution/status until credentials, order ack lifecycle, and fill lifecycle each have runtime-backed proof.

issues.title: fin_netflow remains source_auth_blocked because COINGLASS_API_KEY is missing
issues.next_action: Configure COINGLASS_API_KEY, then keep heartbeat collection running until successful ETF-flow snapshots replace auth_missing rows and coverage starts to move.

issues.title: support-aware core_plus_macro patch must stay visible but reference-only
issues.action: Keep the same recommended_patch summary across /api/status, /lab, hb_predict_probe.py, live_decision_quality_drilldown.py, and docs; do not promote it from reference-only until current-live exact support reaches the minimum rows.

issues.title: model stability still needs work (cv=0.6076, cv_std=0.1254, cv_worst=0.4450)
issues.action: 優先比較 support-aware / shrinkage profiles 與 current bucket robustness，避免把治理 blocker 誤當單純 parity 問題。

issues.title: recent canonical window 250 rows = distribution_pathology
issues.action: 直接對 recent canonical rows 做 feature variance / distinct-count / target-path drill-down；維持 decision-quality guardrails，並檢查 calibration scope 是否仍被病態 slice 稀釋。 recent_window=250, alerts=['label_imbalance', 'regime_concentration', 'regime_shift'], win_rate=0.0040, delta_vs_full=-0.6266, dominant_regime=bull(100.00%), interpretation=distribution_pathology, avg_pnl=-0.0099, avg_quality=-0.2816, avg_dd_penalty=0.3739, spot_long_win_rate=0.0000, feature_diag=variance:12/56, frozen:1, compressed:11, expected_static:1, overlay_only:1, unexpected_frozen:0, distinct:11, null_heavy:10, tail_streak=1x0 since 2026-04-18 14:33:06.990329 -> 2026-04-18 14:33:06.990329, adverse_streak=248x0 since 2026-04-17 14:10:52.490354 -> 2026-04-18 13:43:25.809469, prev_win_rate=0.664, delta_vs_prev=-0.66, prev_quality=0.3219, quality_delta_vs_prev=-0.6035, prev_pnl=0.0069, pnl_delta_vs_prev=-0.0168, top_shift_examples=feat_4h_bb_pct_b(0.6105→0.9496,Δσ=1.0544)/feat_4h_bias20(1.3672→3.0515,Δσ=1.014)/feat_eye(2.0741→-1.2536,Δσ=0.8704), new_compressed=feat_vwap_dev, frozen_examples=feat_4h_ma_order(0.0/1), compressed_examples=feat_body(0.0/250)/feat_ear(0.0066/250)/feat_tongue(0.0107/250), expected_static_examples=feat_4h_ma_order[discrete_regime_feature], overlay_only_examples=feat_scales_ssr[research_sparse_source], distinct_examples=feat_4h_ma_order(1/3)/feat_4h_dist_swing_high(0/0)/feat_chorus(0/0), null_examples=feat_4h_dist_swing_high(0.0)/feat_chorus(0.0)/feat_fin_netflow(0.0), recent_examples=2026-04-18 13:43:25.809469:0:bull:-0.2137/2026-04-18 14:05:07.655417:1:bull:0.2985/2026-04-18 14:33:06.990329:0:bull:-0.1981, adverse_examples=2026-04-18 13:00:00.000000:0:bull:-0.2342/2026-04-18 13:36:43.970223:0:bull:-0.2119/2026-04-18 13:43:25.809469:0:bull:-0.2137

issues.action: 把 hb_predict_probe 納入每輪 heartbeat 驗證，對 exact live lane、當前 calibration scope 與 worst narrowed scope 做 root-cause drill-down；優先檢查 exact lane 是否仍是 ALLOW 但 canonical true-negative share 已偏高，並交叉比對 recent same-scope / narrowed-scope 4H shifts、scope selection、與 execution guardrail 是否只是正確地把壞 pocket 擋下。 live_scope=regime_label+entry_quality_label, regime=bull/CAUTION, label=D, sample_size=199, window=199, alerts=['label_imbalance'], expected_win_rate=0.0, expected_pnl=-0.0199, expected_quality=-0.4283, layers=0→0, top_shifts=n/a, exact_live_lane=(rows=1,wr=0.0,q=-0.4283,dd=0.3984,tuw=0.9957,recent500_dom=bull|CAUTION@1.0,targets=loss:1,true_negative_rows=1@1.0,final_gate=CAUTION:1), scope_matrix=regime_label+regime_gate+entry_quality_label:rows=1,wr=0.0,q=-0.4283,dd=0.3984,tuw=0.9957,alerts=['constant_target'],recent500_dominant=bull@1.0,recent500_gate_dominant=CAUTION@1.0,recent500_regime_gate_dominant=bull|CAUTION@1.0,recent500_regimes=bull:1,recent500_gates=CAUTION:1,recent500_regime_gates=bull|CAUTION:1; issues.action: 市場 regime 可能已變化; 考慮 regime-gated feature weighting

issues.title: current live bucket CAUTION|structure_quality_caution|q35 support remains under minimum (1/50)
issues.action: 以 current live structure bucket 為主追 exact support / governance route；不要沿用舊 q35 blocker 當成本輪主 blocker。
